Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Vacate Dismissal Pursuant To Crc 225
Off Calendar Oct-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Defendant and Cross-Complainants Albert Y. Seto, Janet T. Seto, Emmanuel K. Pun, and Julie Pun's Motion to Vacate Dismissal issued by the count on 6/17/2003 pursuant to CRC 225, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal is ordered set aside and vacated. Order signed. Court ordered Case re-set to 12/16/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212, CRC 225 Calendar. Proceedings reported by: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR #3058. (212)

MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Case consolidated with Case No. 319413 previously dismissed. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Aug-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Ethan Friedman appearing for plaintiff and cross-defendant Victor Makras; Robert White appearing for cross-defendants and cross-complainants Puns and Setos; Daniel Stea appearing for defendant Jimmy Jen and David Millstein, specially appearing for Jimmy Jen.

Court and counsel met in chambers. Current counsel for defendant Jimmy Jen will file a motion for withdrawal of attorney on shortened time to be heard on Sep-13-2002 at 9:30 am in Dept. 206. Current stay is extended until Sep-13-2002 for all matters. Matter will be set for trial on Mar-10-2003, with a new mandatory settlement conference to be set.
